meta.title: 城市规划与可持续发展
meta.description: Upper-intermediate urban planning and sustainable development vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: infrastructure, green building, and livability.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 중급~중상급 도시 계획·지속가능발전 어휘와 문형: 기반시설, 친환경 건축, 살기 좋은 도시.

questions.prompt: 「城市规划」是什么意思？(What does 城市规划 mean?)

explanation.en: 「基础设施建设」(jīchǔ shèshī jiànshè) means "infrastructure construction".
explanation.ko: 「基础设施建设」(jīchǔ shèshī jiànshè)는 '기반시설 건설'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「基础设施建设」是什么意思？(What does 基础设施建设 mean?)

explanation.en: 「绿色建筑」(lǜsè jiànzhù) means "green building", environmentally friendly architecture.

questions.prompt: 「绿色建筑」是什么意思？(What does 绿色建筑 mean?)
「城市化进程」是什么意思？(What does 城市化进程 mean?)

explanation.ko: 「宜居城市」(yíjū chéngshì)는 '살기 좋은 도시'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「宜居城市」是什么意思？(What does 宜居城市 mean?)
科学的___可以有效缓解交通拥堵问题。(Scientific urban planning can effectively alleviate traffic congestion.)
政府加大了对偏远地区___的投入，改善了当地的交通条件。(The government increased investment in infrastructure construction in remote areas, improving local transportation conditions.)
这栋___采用了太阳能发电系统，非常环保。(This green building uses a solar power generation system, very eco-friendly.)
随着___的加快，越来越多的农村人口涌入城市。(As the urbanization process accelerates, more and more rural populations pour into cities.)
这座城市因为环境优美、生活便利，被评为___。(This city was rated as a livable city because of its beautiful environment and convenient living.)
尽管城市发展迅速，___交通拥堵问题依然没有得到根本解决。(Although the city develops rapidly, traffic congestion still hasn't been fundamentally solved.)
无论是新城区还是老城区，规划___应该考虑居民的实际需求。(Whether new districts or old districts, planning should always consider residents' actual needs.)
除非合理规划城市布局，___交通和环境问题会越来越严重。(Unless the city layout is reasonably planned, traffic and environmental problems will become increasingly serious.)
这座城市之所以能实现可持续发展，___是因为坚持了科学规划的理念。(This city was able to achieve sustainable development precisely because it stuck to the concept of scientific planning.)

explanation.en: 「一方面〜另一方面〜」means "on one hand 〜, on the other hand 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一方面〜另一方面〜」는 '한편으로는 ~, 다른 한편으로는 ~'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一方面城市要满足经济发展的需要，___方面也要保护生态环境。(On one hand the city needs to meet the needs of economic development, on the other hand it also needs to protect the ecological environment.)
这项规划方案充分___了未来人口增长的需求。(This planning proposal fully considered future population growth needs.)
城市绿化___了空气质量，提高了居民的生活质量。(Urban greening improved air quality, raising residents' quality of life.)
为了实现可持续发展，这座城市大力___公共交通系统。(In order to achieve sustainable development, this city vigorously developed its public transportation system.)

explanation.en: 「兼顾」(jiāngù) means "to give consideration to [multiple things simultaneously]".

questions.prompt: 这个新区的规划___了商业、住宅和绿地的合理布局。(This new district's planning takes into account the reasonable layout of commercial, residential, and green spaces.)
城市管理者应该充分___市民的意见，制定更合理的规划方案。(City managers should fully listen to citizens' opinions, formulating more reasonable planning proposals.)

explanation.en: 「问题」(problem) must come at the end of the compound noun phrase: 交通拥堵问题 (not 问题交通拥堵).
explanation.ko: 「问题」는 복합 명사구 끝에 와야 하므로 '交通拥堵问题'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 科学的城市规划可以有效缓解问题交通拥堵。(Scientific urban planning can effectively alleviate traffic congestion.) — find the error
choices: 科学的城市规划可以有效缓解交通拥堵问题。
科学的城市规划可以有效缓解问题交通拥堵。
科学的城市规划可以有效交通拥堵缓解问题。
科学的城市规划有效可以缓解交通拥堵问题。

explanation.en: 「都」must come before 应该 (should): 都应该 (not 应该都).
explanation.ko: 「都」는 '应该' 앞에 와야 하므로 '都应该'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 无论是新城区还是老城区，规划应该都考虑居民的实际需求。(Whether new districts or old districts, planning should always consider residents' actual needs.) — find the error
choices: 无论是新城区还是老城区，规划都应该考虑居民的实际需求。
无论是新城区还是老城区，规划应该都考虑居民的实际需求。
无论是新城区还是老城区，都规划应该考虑居民的实际需求。
无论是新城区还是老城区，规划考虑都应该居民的实际需求。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 这座城市之所以能实现可持续发展，因为是坚持了科学规划的理念。(This city was able to achieve sustainable development precisely because it stuck to the concept of scientific planning.) — find the error
choices: 这座城市之所以能实现可持续发展，是因为坚持了科学规划的理念。
这座城市之所以能实现可持续发展，因为是坚持了科学规划的理念。
这座城市之所以能实现可持续发展，是坚持因为了科学规划的理念。
这座城市之所以能实现可持续发展，坚持是因为了科学规划的理念。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 科学的城市规划可以有效缓解交通拥堵问题 ("Scientific urban planning can effectively alleviate traffic congestion").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '科学的城市规划可以有效缓解交通拥堵问题' (과학적인 도시 계획은 교통 정체 문제를 효과적으로 완화할 수 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 科学的城市规划可以__________。(Scientific urban planning can effectively alleviate traffic congestion.)
words: 有效缓解交通拥堵问题
questions.answer: 有效缓解交通拥堵问题

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 无论是新城区还是老城区，规划都应该考虑居民的实际需求 ("Whether new districts or old districts, planning should always consider residents' actual needs").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '无论是新城区还是老城区，规划都应该考虑居民的实际需求' (신도시든 구도심이든 계획은 항상 주민의 실제 요구를 고려해야 한다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 无论是新城区还是老城区，规划__________考虑居民的实际需求。(Whether new districts or old districts, planning should always consider residents' actual needs.)
